data.name: label2.Text
data.value:
--- The rules of the X O game (Tic-Tac-Toe) include :
1. The game is played on a 3x3-dimensional grid. 2. Players take turns placing X and O in empty squares. 3. The objective is to achieve a consecutive line of three Xs or Os vertically, horizontally, or diagonally. 4. If all squares are filled without a winning line, the game ends in a draw. 5. The game stops when a player achieves a winning line or it ends in a draw.
